consistency.class_reference: The feature explicitly names the 'rogue' class, which is consistent with the 'class' field.
consistency.level_progression: The level (14) is a standard late-game feature level for core classes, suggesting consistency with general class progression patterns.

quality.clarity: The description is clear, stating the trigger ('able to hear') and the effect (awareness of hidden/invisible creatures within 10 feet).
quality.completeness: It is a complete mechanical description, though cross-referencing the definition of '[invisible](#invisible)' might be necessary for full application.

mechanics.effect: Awareness of hidden or invisible creatures, bypassing standard hiding mechanics within range.
mechanics.interaction_notes: This feature functions similarly to blindsight but is conditional on hearing. It effectively grants a limited form of Tremorsense or Blindsight under the specific condition of auditory input.
